(1) इन िनयम犘 का संि楹玅 नाम प犆शन िनिध िविनयामक और िवकास 灹ािधकरण (अ瀇य楹 और पूण榁कािलक सद瀡य को संदेय वेतन और भ牵े तथा सेवा के अ瀈य िनबंधन शत犈) (दूसरा संशोधन) िनयम, 2017 है। (2) ये राजप灴 म犆 उनके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ牵 ह犘गे। 2. प犆शन िनिध िविनयामक और िवकास 灹ािधकरण (अ瀇य楹 और पूण榁कािलक सद瀡य को संदेय वेतन और भ牵े तथा सेवा के अ瀈य िनबंधन शत犈) िनयम, 2014 (िजसम犆 इसके प玑ात् इसे उ猴 िनयम कहा गया है), िनयम 5 के उप-िनयम (2) म犆 श瀑द犘 के 瀡थान पर “तीन लाख और िपछ牵र 牱पये” श瀑द “चार लाख 牱पये” रखे जाएंगे : परंतु िव獸मान पूण榁कािलक सद瀡य 1 जनवरी, 2016 से 灹वृ牵 इस िनयम के अधीन वेतन के िलए हकदार होगा । 3. उ猴 िनयम犘 के िनयम 6 म犆,- (क) उप-िनयम (1) म犆, श瀑द犘 और को玙क犘 के 瀡थान “शीष榁 炈ेणी [अ瀡सी हजार 牱पये (िनयत) 灹ितमाह]” श瀑द “वेतन मै琇灩榉स म犆 瀡तर 17” रखे जाएंगे ; (ख) उप-िनयम (2) म犆, श瀑द犘 के 瀡थान पर “तीन 灹ितशत क琉 दर पर वा琔ष榁क वेतनवृि獳 के साथ वेतनमान सड़सठ हजार 牱पये” श瀑द “वेतन मै琇灩榉स म犆 瀡तर 15” रखे जाएंगे । -- 1 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 4. उ猴 िनयम犘 के िनयम 7 म犆, उप-िनयम (2) के 瀡थान पर िन玈िलिखत उप-िनयम रखा जाएगा, अथा榁त् :- (2) अ瀇य楹 और 灹瀄येक पूण榁कािलक सद瀡य भारत से बाहर िवदेशी दौरा केवल के瀈灶ीय सरकार 獧ारा जारी आदेश犘 के वचनबंध करेगा और अ瀇य楹 के मामले म犆 वेतन मै琇灩榉स के 瀡तर 17 और पूण榁कािलक सद瀡य के मामले म犆 वेतन मै琇灩榉स के 瀡तर 15 म犆 वे के瀈灶ीय सरकार के अिधका琇रय犘 के िलए यथा लागू ऐसे दौर犘 के स瀓ब瀈ध म犆 ऐसे भ牵犘 को आह琇रत के िलए हकदार ह犘गे ।” 5. उ猴 िनयम犘 के िनयम 8 म犆, िन玈िलिखत िनयम रखा जाएगा, अथा榁त् :- “8. छु獉ी या灴ा 琇रयायत :- अ瀇य楹 और 灹瀄येक पूण榁कािलक सद瀡य, अ瀇य楹 के मामले म犆 वेतन मै琇灩榉स के 瀡तर 17 और पूण榁कािलक सद瀡य के मामले म犆 वेतन मै琇灩榉स के 瀡तर 15 म犆 के瀈灶ीय सरकार के अिधका琇रय犘 उसी दर पर लागू होते ह犉, या灴ा 琇रयायत छु獉ी के िलए हकदार ह犘गे ।” 6. उ猴 िनयम犘 के िनयम 14 म犆, िन玈िलिखत िनयम रखा जाएगा, अथा榁त् :- ““““14. टेली 14. टेली 14. टेली 14. टेलीफोन सुिवधा फोन सुिवधा फोन सुिवधा फोन सुिवधा :::: अ瀇य楹 और पूण榁कािलक सद瀡य, अ瀇य楹 के मामले म犆 वेतन मै琇灩榉स के 瀡तर 17 और पूण榁कािलक सद瀡य के मामले म犆 वेतन मै琇灩榉स के 15 म犆 के瀈灶ीय सरकार के अिधका琇रय犘 के िलए अनु榀ेय है, टेलीफोन सुिवधा के िलए पा灴 ह犘गे ।” [फा. सं. 11/5/2014-पीआर] डॉ. मदनेश कुमार िम炈ा, संयु猴 सिचव 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण :::: मूल िनयम अिधसूचना सं. सा.का.िन. 597(अ), तारीख 20 अग瀡त, 2014 獧ारा भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण भाग II, खंड 3, उप-खंड (i) म犆 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और सा.का.िन. 987(अ), तारीख 2 अग瀡त, 2017 獧ारा प玑ा瀄वत牸 संशोिधत 琈कए गए । MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department Of Financial Services) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd January, 2018 G.S.R. 07(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of sub-section (2) of Section 51, read with sub-section (3) of Section 5, of the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 2013 (23 of 2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (Salary and Allowances Payable to, and Other Terms and Conditions of Service of, Chairperson and Whole-time Members) Rules, 2014, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (Salary and Allowances Payable to, and Other Terms and Conditions of Service of, Chairperson and Whole-time Members) (Second Amendment) Rules, 2017. (2). They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (Salary and Allowances Payable to, and Other Terms and Conditions of Service of, Chairperson and Whole-time Members) Rules, 2014 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), in rule 5, in sub-rule (2), for the words “three lakh and seventy five thousand rupees”, the words “four lakh rupees” shall be substituted. Provided that the existing whole-time member shall be entitled to a salary under this rule with effect from the 1st day of January, 2016. 3. In rule 6 of the said rules, - (a) in sub-rule (1), for the words and brackets “in the Apex Grade [eighty thousand rupees (fixed) per month]’’, the words “in level 17 of the pay matrix” shall be substituted. -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 (b) in sub-rule (2), for the words “having any pay scale of sixty-seven thousand rupees and seventy-nine thousand rupees per month with an annual increment at the rate of three per cent.”, the words “in level 15 of the pay matrix” shall be substituted. 4. In rule 7 of the said rules, for sub-rule (2), the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:- “(2) The Chairperson and every whole-time member shall undertake tours outside India only in accordance with orders issued by the Central Government and they shall be entitled to draw such allowances in respect of such visits as applicable to the officers of the Central Government in level 17 of the pay matrix in the case of Chairperson and in level 15 of the pay matrix in the case of the whole- time member”. 5. For rule 8 of the said rules, the following rule shall be substituted, namely:- “8. Leave travel concession.—The Chairperson and every whole-time member shall be entitled to leave travel concession at the same rate as are applicable to the officers of the Central Government in level 17 of the pay matrix in the case of Chairperson and in level 15 of the pay matrix in the case of the whole- time member”. 6. For rule 14 of the said rules, the following rule shall be substituted, namely:- “14. Telephone facility.—The Chairperson and the whole-time members shall be eligible for telephone facility as are admissible to the officers of the Central Government in level 17 of the pay matrix in the case of Chairperson and in level 15 of the pay matrix in the case of whole- time member”. [F. No. 11/05/2014-PR] Dr. MADNESH KUMAR MISHRA, Jt. Secy. Note.— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide notification No. G.S.R. 597(E), dated the 20th August, 2014 and subsequently amended by G.S.R. 987(E), dated the 2nd August, 2017.
